title.zh: Astropy NDData：处理缺失 mask 的传播逻辑
title.en: Astropy NDData: handle missing masks during propagation

summary.zh: 审查一个 Astropy NDData PR：作者调整 mask 传播中的 None 判断，让没有 mask 的 operand 复用已有复制逻辑。
summary.en: Review an Astropy NDData PR: the author changes a None check in mask propagation so operands without masks reuse the existing copy logic.

reviewTarget.note: The reviewed patch is an AgentCode adapted patch for review training. It is not the upstream maintainer patch unless explicitly stated.

pr.title: Treat operands without masks like missing-mask arithmetic inputs
pr.author: codegen-agent
body: NDData arithmetic currently handles the case where no second operand participates in mask propagation, but it does not consistently handle a real operand whose mask attribute is None.
This PR changes the branch to check operand.mask is None, so an operand without a mask falls back to copying the current object's mask instead of attempting to combine two masks.
Added a regression test for arithmetic between data_with_mask and data_without_mask to confirm the result mask is copied rather than shared. Existing NDData tests pass.

background: NDDataRef arithmetic combines input masks when both operands have masks, or copies the available mask when only one side has one.
Call paths can pass operand as None, and they can also pass an operand object whose mask is None. These are different states.
The review context includes the pre-patch mask propagation excerpt in src-ndarithmetic.py.

notes: The patch dereferences operand.mask before proving operand is not None. Existing call paths where operand itself is None now raise AttributeError instead of copying self.mask.
The two None states have different meanings: missing operand and present operand without a mask. They need separate branches in the correct order.
The new test covers only the present-operand-with-mask-None case. It does not cover operand is None, which is the path broken by the condition rewrite.

learningGoal: 判断 None 语义和属性访问顺序是否覆盖所有调用路径。

terms.description: 运算后把输入数据的 mask 合并到结果。
表示没有第二个 NDData operand 的调用路径。
表示第二个 operand 存在但没有 mask。
返回 mask 副本，避免结果引用输入对象状态。

behaviorChecks.input: self 有 mask，operand 是 None
behaviorChecks.reviewQuestion: 补丁是否在确认 operand 存在前访问 operand.mask？

behaviorChecks.input: self 有 mask，operand 存在但 mask 是 None
behaviorChecks.reviewQuestion: 这和 operand is None 是否是同一条分支？
修复是否只影响缺失 mask 的路径？
